Transform & Thrive Coaching

For the growth-minded souls who are ready to live life by design.

Transform & Thrive Coaching

For the growth-minded souls who are ready to live life by design.

Who is this for?

If you're a rule-breaker who doesn't conform to society's limiting conditioning...

If you're a changemaker who can't feel fulfilled through conventional success...

If you're an active learner who’ve been levelling up yourself through self-help books and personal growth courses...

If you're an aspired global citizen who wants to live in your highest alignment to unleash your bigger, global impact...

Then chances are you've always known you're meant to be living an extraordinary life on this earth.

You want freedom, success and fulfilment, without hustling yourself into burnout or sacrificing your authenticity.

Who is this for?

If you're a rule-breaker who doesn't conform to society's limiting conditioning...

If you're a changemaker who can't feel fulfilled through conventional success...

If you're an active learner who’ve been levelling up yourself through self-help books and personal growth courses...

If you're an aspired global citizen who wants to live in your highest alignment to unleash your bigger, global impact...

Then chances are you've always known you're meant to be living an extraordinary life on this earth.

You want freedom, success and fulfilment, without hustling yourself into burnout or sacrificing your authenticity.

Yet, are you also experiencing one or more of the guilty secrets of

most visionary dreamers?

✓ Despite the successes achieved in life, do you have a lingering sensation—deep down inside—that so much more is possible for you?

✓ Even though you've gone through countless self-help programmes and personal & spiritual development, you still don't feel like you're living in the reality you truly want?

✓ Are you facing major life transitions like career change or relationship shift, and all of a sudden feeling a lack of direction or clarity?

✓ You're not lonely—but sometimes it could feel really alone on this different path you've chosen?

Do you experience success in one area of your life whilst in another you are still caught up in struggle or self-doubt?

If any of this had you nodding your head, thinking “yeah, that’s me”—then read on, because…

I GET IT. I’VE BEEN THERE TOO.
AND SO DID MY CLIENTS BEFORE THEIR TRANSFORMATIONS.

I GET IT. I’VE BEEN THERE TOO.
AND SO DID MY CLIENTS BEFORE THEIR TRANSFORMATIONS.

From Success by Chance, to Thriving by Design…

Life is a magnificent journey and it’s an ever-expanding realm of possibilities & opportunities! And personal transformation is the master key that unlocks your fastest path to sustained success, joy and fulfilment.

Imagine stepping into a life where you wake up every day, filled with purpose, joy and freedom beyond your wildest dreams. Picture yourself thriving in your zone of genius, making a profound impact while being financially rewarded with abundance.

It's SO POSSIBLE to finally live in your deep purpose without jumping yet onto another self-improvement seminar to feel disappointed again.


There are hundreds of dreamers & changemakers I've already guided—who once felt stuck, confused or unfulfilled—now living the global life of their dreams.

Over the past few years, I work exclusively with growth-minded individuals who are committed to transform their lives, aspiring to become high performers and make a tangible impact on the world.

Some of my favourite highlights include helping:

✔ A Professional Athlete breaking world-records & build her authentic brand to inspire millions of women...

✔ Senior Executives made their dreams outside the corporate box a reality (including one who kicked off a national social movement!)...

✔ Holistic and Wellness Practitioners unleashed their global vision and scale their business impact by 10X through doing LESS...

From Success by Chance, to Thriving by Design…

Imagine stepping into a life where you wake up every day, filled with purpose, joy and freedom beyond your wildest dreams. Picture yourself thriving in your zone of genius, making a profound impact while being financially rewarded with abundance.

✔ Holistic and Wellness Practitioners unleashed their global vision and scale their business impact by 10X through doing LESS...

AND IT DOESN’T MATTER WHERE YOU’RE STARTING FROM…
Because the key to unlocking fast success is within you.
Transform & Thrive Coaching is your catalyst, so you can finally acquire this key.

Because the key to unlocking fast success is within you.
Transform & Thrive Coaching is your catalyst, so you can finally acquire this key.

You know this coaching is for you, when…

✓ You're ready to embark on the ultimate journey of self-mastery so you can unlock your full potential

✓ You're ready to create more wealth through making positive impacts on others and the world

✓ You desire to create more time freedom to actually enjoy the things you love, travel more, spend time with loved ones

✓ You're tired of traditional self-help and ready to fast-track your success through radical transformation

✓ You're a multi-passionate who wants to "have it all"—purpose, passion, impact & more!

✓ You're committed to playing full out and creating at least a 10X return on investment with your time, money, and energy

✓ You're a self-development lover, Mindvalley member or Hay House reader, ready to take your work from informational to transformational

✓ You see yourself as the creator of your reality and ready to do the integration work to manifest what you truly want

Coaching is NOT for you, if…

You're looking for someone to do the work for you, or have a fixed mindset.

You're unwilling to invest in yourself for your professional development and personal growth.

You're seeking a quick fix without going outside your comfort zone.

You're not open to challenging your existing beliefs and paradigms.

CLICK TO TRANSFORM

Working With Me :

It doesn't matter if you call me a life coach, a mindset coach, or a transformational coach...

My purpose is to help you realise your full potential, create breakthroughs from the inside-out, and bridge the gap between...

WHERE YOU ARE & WHERE YOU’RE GOING,

WHO YOU’VE BEEN & WHO YOU’RE BECOMING.

My role is to be your catalyst for success—empowering you to reach your goals with ease, grace, and flow.

My methodology is different from the traditional linear-way of coaching, because I believe in transformation as a WHOLE person, and thriving in ALL areas of life.

And if certifications are important to you, I’m a Certified Life Coach & Hypnotherapist with Evercoach by Mindvalley, the world’s biggest self-development platform.

The Time is Now.

If you've read this far, I totally understand the hesitation that may arise when we feel overwhelmed by the demands of life.

Like, there's so much on your plate already… should I really start a new coaching journey!?

Again, I’ve been there… So I can tell you from personal experience as well, this is the perfect moment to prioritise your growth and say ‘YES’ to yourself.

I still remember in 2020, after hitting rock bottom during COVID, in just a year I read 52 books and completed over 6 personal growth courses. But the real "click" only came through when I connected with mentors like Ajit and Ronan (you can see their handsome faces above!).

That's why soon after, I also stepped onto the path of becoming a certified coach myself, embarking on this mission of empowering YOU!

Today, in 2024 alone (excluding all the courses, events, and retreats...), I've invested over $50k in myself through coaching & mentorship—with Regan Hillyer (my Mindset & Identity Coach), Navdeep Pasricha (my Speaking Coach), Shoshanna Raven (my Entrepreneurship Mentor), and Cham Tam at Authentic Education (my Marketing Business Mentor).

Because I recognised the transformative power of investing in myself. Not only has it saved me so much time, money and energy otherwise impossible, but it has also yielded a 10X return on investment in all life areas.

So, I invite you to ask yourself, what would be the cost of continuing to walk this path alone, to continue to live life not fully fulfilled? Hoping things on the outside would just automatically become better without doing the necessary deep work?

This time, I promise you that you're not going to fall off the path. Because I am walking with you as you say ‘YES’ to this life-changing journey of self-discovery & self-mastery.

AFTER ALL, YOU TOO ARE MEANT TO LIVE AN EXTRAORDINARY LIFE.

IT'S TIME TO THRIVE!

APPLY TO TRANSFORM

IT'S TIME TO THRIVE!

APPLY TO TRANSFORM

This could be how you feel too during our journey:

I WANT THIS! I'M IN!

This could be how you feel too during our journey:

I WANT THIS! I'M IN!

FAQs

1) Where do the sessions take place? What about different time zones?

All 1:1 sessions take place virtually on Google Meet. I serve clients globally (including cases such as coaching through a satellite phone while my client was climbing Mount Everst!), so rest assure we'd always find our sessions schedule in a way that works best for both of us. A successful coaching journey takes full commitment.

In rare cases with my long-term clients based in Sydney or Australia, I may offer in-person immersion day-out experience as part of our coaching programme (in case you also came across our fun on social media!) These intensive sessions are customised to provide a profound experience geared towards transcendental growth.

2) How do I know we're a great fit?

Firstly, I want to acknowledge your thoughtfulness in ensuring we're a great fit before committing to work together. This is a crucial step in any transformational process, so I'm glad you're considering this carefully!

The best way to determine if we're truly aligned is to have an initial Strategy Session Call first. This safe space allows us to connect on a deeper level, explore your goals and aspirations, and see if we resonate with each other.

During our call, while you can expect to take away at least one powerful insight to take action on, I'll also be looking to understand if we share the same core values that form the foundation of a powerful coaching partnership.

Some of the key values I deeply resonate with include personal growth and self-mastery, authenticity and living in alignment, and making a positive impact on the world. If our values and mindsets are in harmony, and you feel a deep resonance with my approach to support your goals, then we'll know we're a great fit to embark on this powerful journey together - provided you're also excited about the investment.

However, if during our conversation we discover any misalignment, I'll be the first to recommend that you explore other options. My commitment is to your highest good, and I would never want you to settle for anything less than the perfect coach for you.

3) How does our coaching work? What'd the process look like?

Once we determine that we’re a great fit after a strategy sesion together, we will dive deeper to uncover your highest purpose, take measurable actions, and ultimately achieve your dreams.

In most cases for new clients, I offer a 3-month transformational programme, tailor-made to meet your specific goals according to your personal strengths and weaknesses. We do not determine our coaching fees based on hourly rates because you are not here to see a therapist, you're investing in yourself for profound personal transformation, the level of support you need, and the results you want to see.

So whether you're looking for clarity on building your dream life, an efficient system to achieve your goals, or to rediscover your authentic self — my role is to give you the clarity, tools and map you need to get where you want to be.

While our 1:1 coaching sessions will be tailor-made to your unique needs, here are some of the processes you could expect:

✓ Examining your modes of operating in life
✓ Cultivating a deep sense of self-awareness
✓ Diving deep into identifying passions & purposes
✓ Mastering your individual fears & challenges
✓ Creating empowering mindset & optimising performance
✓ Crafting powerful goals & building plans of actions

4) I've tried other programmes before, what if I don't get results?

I completely understand the frustration of trying self-improvement programme after programme, attending seminar after seminar, and yet not yielding substantial results. That was exactly me before I hired my first life coach.

When you work with me, this journey will be fundamentally different. This is not a "do-it-yourself" programme where you're left to navigate the path alone by someone's teachings. Instead, I'll be your partner, guiding and supporting you every step of the way through our "Do It With You" approach.

I'll hold you accountable to the action points we agree upon each week. The truth is, when we're fully committed to our accelerated growth and have an experienced guide by our side, we cannot "not" succeed. The only thing that can stop you is, paradoxically, the fear of success itself.

But you don't have to take just my word for it. Listen to what my clients have to say in the testimonial sessions above about the profound transformations they've experienced through our work together. Take your time to feel them.

And to ensure YOU receive my utmost attention and focus, I intentionally offer only 10 coaching spots each year, and I only serve a maximum of 5 clients at any point in time.

While I love facilitating group workshops and programmes too, nothing compares to the depth of 1:1 coaching for catalysing true, lasting transformation. Personally, it's in this sacred space that the magic happens.

5) OK I'm in! What's the next step?

Congrats on feeling inspired to embark on this transformative journey! The fact that you're here, reading these words, is no coincidence — your soul is calling you towards something greater.

Your next step is to trust that inner voice and click the application button on this page. By completing the coaching form, you'll allow me to gain a deeper understanding of your unique situation, goals, and aspirations.

Don't hesitate or allow fear to hold you back from writing authentically. Simply follow your heart and intuition!

I can't wait to connect with you personally. May this be the first of many steps you'll always remember — the pivotal decision that unleashed your highest potential and allowed you to create the life you've been dreaming of.

Let's do this!
